products.title: 3-Tier All-Metal Storage Trolley with handle | Green
products.body_html:
Easily organize your tools, accessories, or beauty products with this durable 3-tier storage trolley made entirely of metal. Designed with a sturdy metal frame and metal baskets, this trolley combines modern style and robust functionality.

  • Material: Entirely made of high-quality metal for exceptional durability.
  • Design: 3 spacious metal baskets providing optimal storage space.
  • Mobility: Equipped with metal swivel casters for smooth and effortless movement.
  • Versatile Use: Perfect for beauty salons, kitchens, workshops, or offices.
  • Dimensions: Compact and practical, ideal for small spaces.

Items are delivered in their original packaging, and customers are responsible for assembly. We are not responsible for damages caused during moving or assembly by customers.

Enjoy optimized storage and elegant, all-metal design to enhance your workspace or home.

products.title: Hard Wax Beans | 100g
products.body_html:
Depilatory Hard Wax

Product Description:
This depilatory hard wax is ideal for large-scale temporary hair removal, effectively delaying and slowing down hair regeneration. It helps in reducing hair regrowth efficiently.

Main Ingredients:

  • Hydrogenated resin and glycerol ester gum blends
  • Paraffin wax and beeswax blends
  • Ethylene vinyl acetate copolymer hydrogenated
  • Oil, fragrances

How to Use:

  1. Clean the skin and keep it dry before waxing.
  2. Heat the wax with a heater until it is melted, then wait for the temperature to be suitable for the skin.
  3. Apply a thick layer of wax in the direction of hair growth, and spread it evenly with a scraper or wooden strip.
  4. Tear off the wax in the opposite direction of hair growth after it cools and hardens on the skin.

Warnings:

  • Do not use on skin with varicose veins, abscesses, broken, sunburned, or damaged areas.
  • For first-time use, test a small area of skin in case of allergic reactions.
  • Avoid contact with children.
  • Pellet agglomeration may occur due to hot weather or high pressure during transportation, but this does not affect product efficacy.

Note: For more information, refer to the Product Data Sheet (PDS).

Hydro Jelly Mask 650g | Aloe Vera | Natural Hydration
products.body_html:
Nourish and hydrate your skin with the Aloe Vera Jelly Mask. This 100% natural mask is formulated to moisturize, soothe, and repair your skin, leaving it feeling refreshed and rejuvenated. Ideal for controlling oil and reducing blackheads, while providing anti-aging and antioxidant benefits.

Function:

Brightens, hydrates, reduces wrinkles, controls oil, tightens skin, removes blackheads, provides soothing repair, offers antioxidant benefits, and improves skin repair ability.

Ingredients:

Zea Mays Starch, Niacinamide, Sodium Alginate, Altodextrin, Kojic Acid, Arbutin, Collagen Extract, Hyaluronic Acid, Betaine, Rose Petal, Glutathione, Glycyrrhiza Uralensis (Licorice) Extract, Tocopherol, Retinol, Acetyl Hexapeptide-8, Fullerenes, Panax Ginseng Root Powder, Carthamus Tinctorius (Safflower) Flower Powder, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Powder, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Powder.

Caution:

For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Do not dispose of the mask or pieces down the drain. Store in a cool, dry place.

Direction:

After facial cleansing, mix the jelly mask with purified water until it is particle-free, and apply evenly on the face and neck. After 15-20 minutes, peel off to remove.

Net Weight: 650g / 23 fl. oz.

Satin Sleep Hair Bonnet | Rose
products.body_html:
Silk Satin Hair Bonnet - Protect Your Hair While You Sleep

Keep your hair healthy, hydrated, and tangle-free with our Silk Satin Hair Bonnet. Perfect for curly, frizzy, or natural hair, this bonnet helps reduce friction during sleep, preventing breakage and keeping your hair smooth and shiny.

  • Frizz-Free Protection: The soft satin fabric reduces friction, which helps prevent hair breakage and keeps curls defined.
  • Retains Moisture: Unlike cotton, satin doesn’t absorb moisture from your hair, keeping it hydrated throughout the night.
  • Perfect for All Hair Types: Whether you have curly, straight, or wavy hair, this bonnet ensures your hairstyle stays intact while you sleep.
  • Adjustable and Comfortable: The elastic band ensures a secure fit without being too tight, providing all-night comfort.

Velvet Manucure Chair M-240 | Pink
products.body_html:
Discover the ultimate manicure experience with our luxurious green velvet chair, designed to perfectly complement our high-end manicure tables.

This chair combines elegance and comfort with its luxurious velvet upholstery, ensuring a soft and pleasant touch. The plush cushions provide optimal support for long sessions, ensuring maximum relaxation for your clients.

The golden metal frame, with clean lines and a semi-circular base, not only adds a touch of sophistication but also ensures impeccable stability. This harmonious set between the chair and the manicure table creates an ergonomic and aesthetically pleasing workspace, thus enhancing the image of your salon.

Adopt this pink velvet manicure chair to offer your clients a refined and memorable beauty experience while adding a touch of luxury and modernity to your professional space. Let your salon stand out with furniture that reflects your commitment to excellence and style.

Luxury Marble and Gold Metal Manicure Table | 4 sizes
products.body_html:
Product Description

  • Design: The manicure side table is made of metal with a solid marble block top, featuring a white and gold color scheme, adding a real sense of luxury.
  • Durable: Curvilinear base structure provides uniform force, prevents shaking, is non-slip, and scratch-resistant, protecting your beloved floor.
  • Storage Space: The bottom of the large oval nail table is equipped with an open shelf to provide additional storage space.
  • Multiple Scenarios: The lightweight design makes it easy to move and space-saving, and it can even be used separately.
  • Easy to Install: Installation instructions are included in the package, and the nail table can be assembled in a few steps using the screws provided.

products.title: Nail Art Tool | Cuticle Pusher & Spoon | Black
Professional Double Wax Warmer | Gold and Black
products.body_html:
Product Description

Discover our professional double wax warmer, perfect for all types of waxes and skincare and hair removal treatments.

  • Warm all types of waxes: Suitable for hot, warm, and hard wax.
  • Adjustable temperature knob: Allows you to select the ideal temperature for each type of wax.
  • Removable aluminum container: For convenient use and easy cleaning.
  • Easy operation: Intuitive design for simplified use.
  • Durable metal body: Sturdy construction for prolonged use and easy cleaning.
  • Silent technology: Fast heat conduction with high temperature resistance.
  • Two pots with adjustable temperatures: Convenient use with non-slip rubber feet.
  • Adjustable temperature settings: From 0 to 80 degrees Celsius (32-176 degrees Fahrenheit) with red indicator light.
  • Equipped with two handles: For easy movement during operation.

This device is perfect for beauty professionals looking to provide superior treatments with reliable and easy-to-use equipment.
